FROM 		 
       $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX
       INNER JOIN
				       (
				SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
				WHERE 1=1
				AND FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND (SELECT CASE WHEN FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT =1 THEN 4 ELSE 3 END FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_AGE=0 )
				AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >=0
				) CAL
				ON BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN
				$$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP PMAP
     ON PMAP.PRODUCT_KEY            = BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND   PMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY            = BKG_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 AND PMAP.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD = BKG_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  
 WHERE BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS'
AND PMAP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
		WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_XAAS'
			AND TABLE_NAME ='W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_XAAS')
AND  NOT EXISTS  (SELECT 1 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OFFER_TYPE_RETRO_XAAS WI
 WHERE WI.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AND 
 WI.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE= BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AND
 WI.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE)
    AND 
 (
 BKG_TRX.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME <> PMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 OR
BKG_TRX.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG <> PMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
OR
/*CHANGED AS PART 0F MAR 16 RELEASE -Q3FY17 */
-----BKG_TRX.ELA_FLG <>  PMAP.ELA_FLG
BKG_TRX.ELA_FLG <> (CASE    WHEN BKG_TRX.XCAT_FLG   = 'Y' THEN 'Y'  ELSE PMAP.ELA_FLG END)
)
AND 1=2

FROM 
       $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX
       INNER JOIN
				       (
				SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
				WHERE 1=1
				AND FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND (SELECT CASE WHEN FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT =1 THEN 4 ELSE 3 END FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_AGE=0 )
				AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >=0
				) CAL
				ON BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 INNER JOIN 
        $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 INNER JOIN
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
         ON BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
WHERE BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS'
AND NSO.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_XAAS'
AND TABLE_NAME ='W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_XAAS')
AND BKG_TRX.XCAT_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  COALESCE(NP.XCAT_FLG,'N' ) END)

				AND FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND (SELECT CASE WHEN FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT =1 THEN 4 ELSE 3 END FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_AGE=0 )

				ON BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 INNER JOIN 
        $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO

AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'

    ,0 DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT
    ,0 DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT
    ,0 DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT  
 ,DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
  ,LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
  ,DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
  ,DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT    
  ,DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT  
  ,DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
  ,DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
  ,DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
  ,DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /*Q1FY18*/
 ,0 DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
  ,POB_TYPE_CD
  ,NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
  ,0 DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT
  ,0 DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT   
 , -999  AS SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */
 , ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
 , ACQUISITION_ROLE
 ,DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
 ,DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 ,DV_INV_DTM
 ,DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
 ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
 ,DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
 ,DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
 ,DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE /*Renamed as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
 ,SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
 /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
 ,DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT
 ,TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,DV_FOR_PRTNR_NEW_CUST_FLG
,BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,TOTAL_NETPC_WTHOUT_CR_USD_AMT 
,FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT 
,MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT 
,NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT 
,LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_US_AMT
,SK_ACQ_OPTY_LINE_ID
 FROM
     (SELECT
           WBECN.DRVD_XAAS_BKGS_KEY AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
           COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-6666) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
           COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
           WBECN.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
           -9999 AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
           -9999 AS AR_TRX_KEY,
           WBECN.END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
           WBECN.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
           WBECN.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
           WBECN.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
           WBECN.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
           COALESCE(WBECN.TRANSACTION_DATETIME, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)) AS TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
           WBECN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
           COALESCE(WBECN.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,    
           CASE WHEN NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ELSE BKG_PRCDT.PROCESS_DATE END AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
           COALESCE(WBECN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, -999) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
           -9999 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
           -9999 AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
           -9999 AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
           WBECN.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE,
           WBECN.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
           WBECN.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
           'UNKNOWN' AS IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE,  
           WBECN.ADJUSTMENT_CODE AS ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
           COALESCE(WBECN.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,'XAAS') AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
           COALESCE(WBECN.CANCELLED_FLG, '=') AS CANCELLED_FLG, 
           COALESCE(WBECN.CANCEL_CODE,'=         ') AS CANCEL_CODE,
           COALESCE(WBECN.ACQUISITION_FLG,'=') AS ACQUISITION_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,'=') AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,'=') AS DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,'=') AS CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.OVERLAY_FLG ,'=') AS OVERLAY_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.IC_REVENUE_FLG,'=') AS IC_REVENUE_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.CHARGES_FLG ,'=') AS CHARGES_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.SALESREP_FLG,'=') AS SALESREP_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.MISC_FLG,'=') MISC_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.SERVICE_FLG ,'=') AS SERVICE_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,'=') AS INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,'=') AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.REVENUE_FLG ,'=') AS REVENUE_FLG,
           COALESCE(WBECN.RMA_FLG ,'=') AS RMA_FLG,
           0 AS TRADE_IN_AMOUNT, 
           COALESCE(WBECN.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ,0.000000) AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
           COALESCE(WBECN.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT ,0.000000) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
           COALESCE(WBECN.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,0.000000) AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT, 
           CAST((WBECN.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT*WBECN.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY, 
         /* ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18 */
 COALESCE(WBECN.DV_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,0.000000) AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
 COALESCE(WBECN.DV_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,0.000000) AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,  
 COALESCE(WBECN.DV_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT,0.000000) AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT,  
 COALESCE(WBECN.DV_EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY,0.000000) AS DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY,  
 /* END OF Q2FY18 */    WBECN.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
           CASE WHEN NSO.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT > 0 THEN NSO.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT 
           ELSE COALESCE(N_DISTI.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,-999 ) END AS WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, /* Modified as part of SFP Rel */
           USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
           USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
           CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
           CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
           WBECN.CONVERSION_RT AS CONVERSION_RT, 
           WBECN.CONVERSION_DT AS CONVERSION_DT, 
           /*WBECN.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT AS DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT*/
CASE WHEN WBECN.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'SAASONLINE' THEN -9999 ELSE WBECN.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT END AS DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,  
           case 
 when EL.LINE_ID IS NULL then WBECN.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
 else 
 NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME  end as DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM, /* Join added as a part of April2019 release */
           WBECN.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE AS DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE, 
           WBECN.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD AS DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD, 
           COALESCE(WBECN.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,'USD') AS DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD, 
           COALESCE(WBECN.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE,'XAAS') AS DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE ,
     CASE WHEN MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR = 'UNKNOWN' THEN NULL ELSE MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY END AS ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION_KEY,/* UPDATED THE FIELD AS PART OF FCM Q1FY20 RELEASE */
           '=' AS     ACTION_CODE,
           '=' AS     DML_TYPE,
           WBECN.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME AS DV_TRANSACTION_NAME,  
           WBECN.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT AS BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,
         COALESCE(WBECN.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,'N') AS DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG, 
         COALESCE(WBECN.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,'=') AS DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG, 
           COALESCE(WBECN.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE') AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
         COALESCE(WBECN.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,     
         COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,  
         /* -9999 AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,  Commented as part of OA-Q1FY16*/
       WBECN.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
       WBECN.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
       WBECN.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY /* OA-Q1FY16*/
    ,COALESCE(WBECN.DV_DEAL_ID,'-9999') AS DV_DEAL_ID  /*added for DEAL_ID*/   
    ,WBECN.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
  ,WBECN.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
  ,WBECN.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
  ,WBECN.DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT    
  ,WBECN.DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT  
  ,WBECN.DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
  ,WBECN.DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
  ,WBECN.DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
   ,WBECN.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /*Q1FY8*/
 ,WBECN.POB_TYPE_CD
    ,WBECN.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
     ,WBECN.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
     ,WBECN.ACQUISITION_ROLE
  ,WBECN.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
 ,WBECN.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 ,NXS.DV_INV_DTM AS DV_INV_DTM
 ,NXS.TRX_LINE_CREATION_DTM AS DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
 ,WBECN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 ,WBECN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
 ,WBECN.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
 ,WBECN.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
 ,WBECN.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,WBECN.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,WBECN.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE /*Renamed as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
 ,WBECN.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
 /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
 ,COALESCE(WBECN.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT,0.000000) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT
 ,WBECN.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,WBECN.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,WBECN.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,'UNK' AS DV_FOR_PRTNR_NEW_CUST_FLG
,COALESCE(WBECN.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
 ,COALESCE(WBECN.TOTAL_NETPC_WTHOUT_CR_USD_AMT,0.0000000) AS TOTAL_NETPC_WTHOUT_CR_USD_AMT
 ,COALESCE(WBECN.FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,0.0000000) AS FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
 ,COALESCE(WBECN.MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT,0.0000000) AS MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT
 ,COALESCE(WBECN.NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT,0.0000000) AS NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT
 ,COALESCE(WBECN.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,-9999) AS LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  ,COALESCE(WBECN.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_US_AMT,0.0000000) AS MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_US_AMT
  ,COALESCE(NSOL.SK_ACQ_OPTY_LINE_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SK_ACQ_OPTY_LINE_ID
 FROM 
          (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_XAAS_CURR_NBM  
                    WHERE PROCESS_DATE <= (SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL)
                    AND BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='XAAS'     
        ) WBECN
      INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX NXS
   ON WBECN.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NXS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
   LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
   ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NXS.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY 
   --AND NSOL.SS_CODE='XAAS' 
   /* ADDED THE BELOW JOIN AS PART OF FCM Q1FY20 RELEASE */
        LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION MAD  
     ON NXS.COMMENTS_TXT = MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR
   
   LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO /* Join added as a part of April2019 release */
   ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  INNER JOIN (SELECT TRX_ID,TRX_VERSION,LINE_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_BOOKING_TRANSACTIONS 
  )EL
 ON   EL.TRX_ID=NXS.SK_TRX_ID_INT
 AND EL.TRX_VERSION=NXS.BOOKING_VERSION_INT /* Join added as a part of April2019 release */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
           ON WBECN.DRVD_XAAS_BKGS_KEY=NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
           AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS' AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = WBECN.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
    /* Added below join as part MNL ADJ Enhancement Feb 2 release*/    
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO MT_BILLTO 
            ON MT_BILLTO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = WBECN.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CUST_ACCT_WITH_WIPS_DISTRI N_DISTI
            ON MT_BILLTO.ERP_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = N_DISTI.CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY  
        ,(SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ) BKG_PRCDT
        ) INNER_QUERY
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR CAL  /*added this join to derive new column quarter number*/
         ON INNER_QUERY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=CAL.CALENDAR_DATE

SELECT BK_CALENDAR_DATE 
 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_DAY CAL,
  (SELECT FMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,FMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
    FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH FMONTH,  $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BKG_PRCDT
   WHERE 
    BKG_PRCDT.PROCESS_DATE BETWEEN  FMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) NMONTH
 WHERE CAL.BK_CALENDAR_DATE between NMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
 UNION ALL
 SELECT BK_CALENDAR_DATE 
 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_DAY CAL,
  (SEL * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  
   WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT > (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL)
   QUALIFY  ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ASC)  =1
  ) NEXT_FIS_MNTH
  WHERE CAL.BK_CALENDAR_DATE between NEXT_FIS_MNTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NEXT_FIS_MNTH.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
